languages.text: "Я хочу услышать доводы. Почему священные импланты должны стать доступны для черни?"
"I want to hear your arguments. Why ought the workers be granted access to sacred implants?"
languages.original_text: "Я хочу услышать доводы. Почему священные импланты должны стать доступны для черни?"

traits.locale_text: "I want to hear your arguments. Why ought the workers be granted access to sacred implants?"
"I want to hear your arguments. Why ought the workers be granted access to sacred implants?"
"I want to hear your arguments. Why ought the rabble be granted access to sacred implants?"
"I want to hear your arguments. Why ought the workers be granted access to sacred implants?"
"I want to hear your arguments. Why ought the workers be granted access to sacred implants?"

languages.text: 「あなたの主張を聞きたい。なぜ、聖なるインプラントに一般市民がアクセスできるべきなのか？」
languages.original_text: "I want to hear your arguments. Why ought the rabble be granted access to sacred implants?"

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの主張を聞きたい。なぜ、聖なるインプラントに一般市民がアクセスできるべきなのか？」

languages.text: "Argümanlarınızı duymak istiyorum. Neden işçilerin kutsal implantlara erişimi olsun?"
languages.original_text: "I want to hear your arguments. Why ought the workers be granted access to sacred implants?"

traits.locale_text: "Argümanlarınızı duymak istiyorum. Neden işçilerin kutsal implantlara erişimi olsun?"

languages.text: «Quiero escuchar sus argumentos. ¿Por qué deberían los trabajadores obtener acceso a implantes sagrados?».
languages.original_text: "I want to hear your arguments. Why ought the workers be granted access to sacred implants?"

traits.locale_text: «Quiero escuchar sus argumentos. ¿Por qué deberían los trabajadores obtener acceso a implantes sagrados?».

languages.text: “我想听听你们的理由。工人有什么资格获赐神圣植入物？”
languages.original_text: "I want to hear your arguments. Why ought the workers be granted access to sacred implants?"

traits.locale_text: “我想听听你们的理由。工人有什么资格获赐神圣植入物？”

languages.text: « J'aimerais entendre vos arguments. Pourquoi devrait-on offrir des implants sacrés aux ouvriers ? »
languages.original_text: "I want to hear your arguments. Why ought the workers be granted access to sacred implants?"

traits.locale_text: « J'aimerais entendre vos arguments. Pourquoi devrait-on offrir des implants sacrés aux ouvriers ? »

languages.text: "Ich möchte Eure Argumente hören. Warum sollten die Arbeiter Zugang zu heiligen Implantaten erhalten?"
languages.original_text: "I want to hear your arguments. Why ought the workers be granted access to sacred implants?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich möchte Eure Argumente hören. Warum sollten die Arbeiter Zugang zu heiligen Implantaten erhalten?"
